creator: bjk@FreeBSD.org
text:
We had to mark net/openafs as IGNORE for 10-current and up,since
	it didn't build.  10.0-release is approaching, so it would be
	good to let net/openafs build on it.

Fix: 

I have a patch in ~/public_html/openafs.diff on freefall, aka
	http://people.freebsd.org/~bjk/openafs.diff
How-To-Repeat: 	-
